items.claim: Mark Carney mocked Donald Trump at G7 summit in Italy (video circulating)
items.verdict_hint: AI-generated fake video; Italy G7 was 2024, before Carney became PM

items.claim: Trump's Miami golf club golden statue was surrounded by trash and toilet paper (photo)
items.verdict_hint: Real photo digitally altered — trash/toilet paper added

items.claim: Obama orchestrated a coup against Trump in 2016
items.verdict_hint: Unproven conspiracy claim; widely debunked

items.claim: There was widespread election fraud in the 2020 US election
items.source: Trump Truth Social posts (55 posts in 3 hours, May 11-12)
items.verdict_hint: Repeatedly debunked; courts found no evidence

items.claim: The word 'hantavirus' derives from Hebrew slang
items.verdict_hint: FALSE — name traces to Hantaan River in Korea

items.claim: OpenAI is building an AI smartphone to replace iPhone
items.verdict_hint: Partially confirmed rumor — analyst Ming-Chi Kuo; fast-tracked per May 5 report

items.claim: Amazon is developing a smartphone with AI capabilities
items.verdict_hint: DENIED — Panos Panay stated no current smartphone plans

items.claim: AI smartphone revenue is down 3% due to RAM shortage
items.verdict_hint: Confirmed by Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon

items.claim: Samsung aims to deploy Gemini AI on 800 million devices by end of 2026
items.verdict_hint: Official Samsung announcement

items.claim: AI-generated images about Trump's Venezuela/Maduro operation spread as real
items.verdict_hint: AI-generated deepfakes; real arrest happened but images fake

items.claim: Fake images of an ICE shooting incident circulated as real (AI-edited)
items.verdict_hint: AI-edited images; event details fabricated

items.claim: 四川绵阳北川发生重大交通事故致3人死亡
items.source: 中国互联网联合辟谣平台
items.verdict_hint: 谣言 — 经核查不属实

items.claim: 河南驻马店突发火情（最新消息）
items.source: 中国互联网联合辟谣平台
items.verdict_hint: 旧闻新发 — 实为历史事件被重新传播

items.claim: 通济桥改造项目已黄（项目取消）
items.verdict_hint: 不实信息 — 为博流量编造；发布者已被行政处罚

items.claim: 4月29日大货车侧翻致3人死亡
items.verdict_hint: 谣言 — 核查不属实

items.claim: 汉坦病毒疫情是为影响美国选举人为制造的骗局
items.verdict_hint: FALSE — WHO确认荷兰邮轮实际疫情

items.claim: 汉坦病毒是新冠疫苗的副作用
items.verdict_hint: FALSE — 无科学依据

items.claim: 2022年社媒预言'2026年汉坦病毒'证明疫情被提前计划
items.verdict_hint: FALSE — 模糊预测被事后曲解为证据

items.claim: MMR疫苗导致自闭症
items.verdict_hint: DEBUNKED — 已被反复科学否定

items.claim: AI deepfake audio of Trump mocking Gavin Newsom overlaid on WEF footage
items.verdict_hint: AI-generated deepfake audio; real WEF footage, fake audio

items.claim: Florida is banning 'joyriding' or driving with no specific destination
items.verdict_hint: Under fact-check review — likely exaggerated claim

items.claim: Trump made a state visit to China with tech CEOs in mid-May 2026
items.verdict_hint: Under fact-check — diplomatic activity partially confirmed

items.claim: Police arrested Sienna Halverson (31) in Glendale AZ — specific crime claims
items.verdict_hint: Under fact-check

items.claim: 2026年已有超过3165起deepfake事件（三月单月数据）
items.verdict_hint: Confirmed research data — notable trend claim

items.claim: AI smartphones are the end of the smartphone era (major media claim)
items.verdict_hint: Exaggerated claim — AI SoC penetration only 4% end of 2025

items.claim: Fake news spreads 10x faster than true news on social media
items.verdict_hint: Confirmed MIT Sloan study — legitimate research finding

items.claim: 汉坦病毒名称来自希伯来语俚语
items.verdict_hint: FALSE — 源自朝鲜半岛汉滩江

items.claim: Trump posted 55 times on Truth Social in 3 hours on May 11-12 pushing conspiracy claims
items.verdict_hint: CONFIRMED true posting behavior; claims within posts vary in accuracy
